response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-platform experience, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT architecture, UML modeling, and team management at an executive level, and his German proficiency is only basic — a critical gap for a role requiring C1-level German and client advisory responsibilities.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse technologies (DLang, Node, TypeScript, Linux)
Strong track record of mentoring and creating educational content (workshops, courses)
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, falling far short of C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML expertise, IT architecture design, or formal project leadership
Lacks documented experience in client advisory, compliance, or risk management contexts
